name: session_digest
description: Summarize all external agent sessions and costs for the supervisor

session_id.description: Optional single session id to emphasize; omit for a full digest

steps.description: List all external agent sessions (status, last message, cost)

Produce a supervisor-style session digest from agent_status. If a focus session_id was provided ({session_id}), call that session out first. Cover each session: title/id short form, status (working|needs_input|done|error|stopped), last useful message snippet, cost if present. Then totals: how many need input, how many failed, rough total cost. End with at most two recommended actions (e.g. answer needs_input, stop a stuck session, spawn a follow-up). If no sessions, say so in one sentence. Concise; suitable to speak aloud under 90 seconds.
